introSection: Southern Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Tropic Falls in Foley, Alabama, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Southern Express was announced along with Tropic Falls (then called Park at OWA) at the 2016 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

The coaster officially opened on July 21, 2017.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a single helix.

fullText:
Southern Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Tropic Falls in Foley, Alabama, USA.

Southern Express was announced along with Tropic Falls (then called Park at OWA) at the 2016 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

The coaster officially opened on July 21, 2017.

The ride has a single helix.
